name: Mediterranean Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Lightly oil a large roasting pan or deep casserole.
3. Remove skin from chicken. Place chicken in the roasting pan, breast side up. Peel and halve garlic cloves. Rub the surface of the chicken with cut garlic, then place cloves inside the chicken.
4. Mix together olive oil, tarragon, sage, and vinegar. Pour over the surface of the chicken and inside the cavity. Cut potatoes into quarters and place olives and potatoes around the chicken. Cover pan and place in oven.
5. Roast until juice runs clear when a sharp knife is inserted into the thigh of the bird (45 minutes to 1 hour). Slice or cut into serving pieces and serve with olives, potatoes, and cooking liquid.
